name: image2prompt-local-dev
description: Local development orchestration for Image2Prompt (containers, Python services, Angular portals). Not a publishable package.

scripts.local:services-ui:start-all: npm run local:services:start-all && npm run local:portals:start-all
scripts.local:services-ui:stop-all: npm run local:portals:stop-all && npm run local:services:stop-all
scripts.local:services-ui:status-all: npm run local:services:status-all && npm run local:portals:status-all
